{{Infobox character
| name = Zyrellon
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Zyrellon]] is the [[Lord of the Broken]] and a Dark [[Lord]] in the [[Fractured Realms]].}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Zyrellon]] is the Dark [[Lord]] who claimed to be the end of the world.}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
